embedData.html: <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com"><link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.gstatic.com" crossorigin><link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Cormorant:ital,wght@0,300;0,400;0,600;1,300&display=swap" rel="stylesheet"><style>*,*::before,*::after{margin:0;padding:0;box-sizing:border-box}:focus-visible{outline:2px solid #A38A1F;outline-offset:2px}a:focus-visible,button:focus-visible,input:focus-visible,textarea:focus-visible,select:focus-visible{outline:2px solid #A38A1F;outline-offset:2px}:root{--bg:#FFFFFF;--bg2:#F0F7FC;--bg3:#E3F0FA;--gold:#A38A1F;--gold2:#B89B2B;--white:#1A2A3A;--muted:#4A5968;--border:rgba(167,216,245,.30);--border2:rgba(212,175,55,.35);--blue:#A7D8F5;--silver:#C0C0C0;}html{scroll-behavior:smooth;-webkit-font-smoothing:antialiased;text-rendering:optimizeLegibility;-webkit-text-size-adjust:100%}body{font-family:-apple-system,BlinkMacSystemFont,'Segoe UI',system-ui,sans-serif;background:var(--bg);color:var(--white);overflow-x:hidden}::-webkit-scrollbar{width:4px}::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb{background:var(--gold);border-radius:2px}a{text-decoration:none;color:inherit}#nav{position:fixed;top:0;left:0;right:0;z-index:999;height:64px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;padding:0 48px;background:rgba(255,255,255,.97);border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);backdrop-filter:blur(20px);box-shadow:0 1px 8px rgba(0,0,0,.06)}.n-brand{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:14px}.n-mark{width:38px;height:38px;border-radius:6px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;flex-shrink:0;overflow:hidden}.n-mark img{width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:contain}.n-name{font-size:11px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:.12em;text-transform:uppercase}.n-sub{font-size:9px;color:var(--muted);letter-spacing:.14em;margin-top:2px}.n-links{display:flex;gap:28px;list-style:none}.n-links a{font-size:9px;letter-spacing:.1em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--muted);transition:color .2s}.n-links a:hover{color:var(--gold)}.n-cta{font-size:9px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:.12em;text-transform:uppercase;color:#FFFFFF;background:var(--gold);padding:10px 22px;border-radius:2px}.n-hamburger{display:none;background:none;border:none;cursor:pointer;padding:8px;flex-direction:column;gap:5px;z-index:1001}.n-hamburger span{display:block;width:22px;height:2px;background:var(--white);transition:transform .3s,opacity .3s}.n-hamburger.active span:nth-child(1){transform:translateY(7px) rotate(45deg)}.n-hamburger.active span:nth-child(2){opacity:0}.n-hamburger.active span:nth-child(3){transform:translateY(-7px) rotate(-45deg)}@media(max-width:820px){.n-links{display:none;flex-direction:column;position:absolute;top:64px;left:0;right:0;background:rgba(255,255,255,.99);border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);padding:20px 24px;gap:0;box-shadow:0 4px 16px rgba(0,0,0,.08)}.n-links.open{display:flex}.n-links li a{display:block;padding:12px 0;font-size:12px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border)}.n-links li:last-child a{border-bottom:none}.n-hamburger{display:flex}.n-cta-desk{display:none}#nav{padding:0 20px}}.cover{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;min-height:100vh;padding-top:64px}.cov-l{display:flex;flex-direction:column;justify-content:center;padding:72px 40px 72px 64px;position:relative}.cov-l::after{content:'';position:absolute;right:0;top:12%;bottom:12%;width:1px;background:linear-gradient(to bottom,transparent,var(--blue),transparent)}.eye{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:12px;font-size:10px;letter-spacing:.14em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--gold);margin-bottom:30px}.eye::before{content:'';width:32px;height:1px;background:var(--blue)}.h1{font-family:'Cormorant',Georgia,serif;font-size:clamp(40px,5.5vw,70px);font-weight:300;line-height:1.05;letter-spacing:-.025em;margin-bottom:24px}.h1 em{font-style:italic;color:var(--gold)}.cov-p{font-size:14px;font-weight:300;color:var(--muted);line-height:1.9;max-width:420px;margin-bottom:44px}.stats{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);gap:1px;background:var(--border);border:1px solid var(--border);width:fit-content;margin-bottom:44px}.st{background:var(--bg2);padding:18px 24px;min-width:108px}.st-n{font-size:34px;font-weight:300;color:var(--gold);line-height:1}.st-l{font-size:9px;color:var(--muted);letter-spacing:.16em;text-transform:uppercase;margin-top:5px}.cov-link{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:14px;font-size:10px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:.14em;text-transform:uppercase;color:#FFFFFF;background:var(--gold);padding:16px 32px;border-radius:2px;transition:background .25s,gap .3s,transform .2s}.cov-link:hover{gap:22px;background:var(--gold2);transform:translateY(-2px)}.cov-r{position:relative;overflow:hidden}.cov-img{width:100%;height:120%;object-fit:cover;filter:brightness(.85) saturate(.9);position:absolute;inset:0;transform:translateY(0);transition:transform .1s linear}.cov-r::after{content:'';position:absolute;inset:0;background:linear-gradient(90deg,var(--bg) 0%,transparent 40%)}.cov-badge{position:absolute;bottom:36px;right:36px;z-index:2;width:96px;height:96px;border-radius:50%;border:1px solid var(--gold);background:rgba(255,255,255,.92);display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;justify-content:center;text-align:center;box-shadow:0 4px 20px rgba(0,0,0,.1)}.cov-badge b{font-size:28px;font-weight:300;color:var(--gold);line-height:1}.cov-badge span{font-size:8px;color:var(--muted);letter-spacing:.1em;text-transform:uppercase;margin-top:3px}@media(max-width:820px){.cover{grid-template-columns:1fr}.cov-r{display:none}.cov-l::after{display:none}.cov-l{padding:60px 24px}}.sec{padding:96px 64px;border-top:1px solid var(--border)}.sec-cream{background:var(--bg3)}@media(max-width:820px){.sec{padding:64px 24px}}.sec-top{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:48px;align-items:start;margin-bottom:56px}@media(max-width:820px){.sec-top{grid-template-columns:1fr}}.eyebrow{font-size:10px;letter-spacing:.14em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--gold);display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;margin-bottom:18px}.h2{font-family:'Cormorant',Georgia,serif;font-size:clamp(26px,3.5vw,46px);font-weight:300;line-height:1.1;letter-spacing:-.02em}.h2 b{font-weight:600;color:var(--gold)}.sec-desc{font-size:13px;color:var(--muted);line-height:1.85;padding-top:4px}.sec-desc-dark{font-size:13px;color:#5a6878;line-height:1.85;padding-top:4px}.tag{font-size:8px;letter-spacing:.16em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--muted);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:20px;padding:4px 12px;margin-right:6px}.eco{font-size:8px;letter-spacing:.16em;text-transform:uppercase;color:#5ecea0;border:1px solid rgba(94,206,160,.3);border-radius:20px;padding:4px 12px}.cat-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(4,1fr);gap:2px;background:var(--border)}@media(max-width:820px){.cat-grid{grid-template-columns:repeat(2,1fr)}}.cc{position:relative;aspect-ratio:1/1.15;overflow:hidden;cursor:pointer;background:var(--bg2)}.cc-img{width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:cover;filter:brightness(.5) saturate(.7);transition:transform .7s cubic-bezier(.16,1,.3,1),filter .5s}.cc:hover .cc-img{transform:scale(1.07);filter:brightness(.35) saturate(.6)}.cc-body{position:absolute;bottom:0;left:0;right:0;padding:24px 22px;background:linear-gradient(to top,rgba(0,0,0,.85) 0%,rgba(0,0,0,.4) 60%,transparent 100%)}.cc-n{font-size:9px;color:var(--gold);letter-spacing:.22em;margin-bottom:6px}.cc-name{font-size:18px;font-weight:600;line-height:1.25;margin-bottom:8px;color:#FFFFFF;text-shadow:0 1px 4px rgba(0,0,0,.5)}.cc-meta{font-size:9px;color:rgba(255,255,255,.75);letter-spacing:.1em;text-transform:uppercase;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px}.cc-meta::before{content:'';width:16px;height:1px;background:var(--gold);flex-shrink:0}.cc-bar{position:absolute;bottom:0;left:0;height:2px;background:var(--gold);width:0;transition:width .5s cubic-bezier(.16,1,.3,1)}.cc:hover .cc-bar{width:100%}.sub{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:14px;font-size:10px;letter-spacing:.14em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--gold);padding:9px 0;margin:48px 0 24px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border)}.sub big{font-size:21px;font-weight:300;color:var(--white);letter-spacing:-.01em;text-transform:none}.pg{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fill,minmax(280px,1fr));gap:1px;background:var(--border)}.pg3{grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fill,minmax(300px,1fr))}.pc{background:var(--bg2);overflow:hidden;position:relative;transition:background .25s,transform .3s,box-shadow .3s}.pc:hover{background:var(--bg3);transform:translateY(-4px);box-shadow:0 8px 24px rgba(167,216,245,.2)}.pc::before{content:'';position:absolute;top:0;left:0;right:0;height:2px;background:var(--gold);transform:scaleX(0);transform-origin:left;transition:transform .35s}.pc:hover::before{transform:scaleX(1)}.pc-img{width:100%;height:152px;object-fit:cover;filter:brightness(.72) saturate(.75);transition:filter .35s;display:block}.pc:hover .pc-img{filter:brightness(.9) saturate(1)}.pc-body{padding:24px}.pc-code{font-size:8px;color:var(--gold);letter-spacing:.12em;text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:9px;font-weight:700}.pc-name{font-size:15px;font-weight:400;line-height:1.4;margin-bottom:13px}.pc-hr{height:1px;background:var(--border);margin-bottom:13px}.pc-ul{list-style:none}.pc-ul li{font-size:11.5px;color:var(--muted);padding:2.5px 0;line-height:1.65;display:flex;align-items:flex-start;gap:9px}.pc-ul li::before{content:'—';color:var(--gold);font-size:10px;flex-shrink:0;margin-top:2px}.pc-foot{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;margin-top:16px;padding-top:12px;border-top:1px solid var(--border)}.pc-pkg{font-size:9.5px;color:var(--muted)}.pc-del{font-size:8px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:.14em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--gold);background:rgba(212,175,55,.1);padding:5px 10px;border-radius:2px}.pc-noimg{width:100%;height:152px;background:var(--bg3);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:44px;opacity:.5;position:relative}.pc-noimg::after{content:'';position:absolute;inset:0;background:radial-gradient(circle at 60% 40%,rgba(212,175,55,.08),transparent 70%)}.tbl-w{overflow-x:auto;margin-bottom:20px}.tbl{width:100%;border-collapse:collapse;min-width:560px}.tbl thead tr{border-bottom:1px solid var(--border)}.tbl th{font-size:8px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:.14em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--gold);padding:11px 16px;text-align:left}.tbl td{font-size:12.5px;color:var(--muted);padding:11px 16px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);line-height:1.5;vertical-align:middle}.tbl tr:hover td{background:var(--bg3);color:var(--white)}.tbl-actions{display:flex;gap:6px;justify-content:flex-end}.tbl-add,.tbl-cmp{width:28px;height:28px;border-radius:4px;border:1px solid var(--border);background:var(--bg);color:var(--muted);font-size:14px;cursor:pointer;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;transition:all .2s;font-family:inherit;line-height:1;flex-shrink:0}.tbl-add:hover{border-color:var(--gold);color:var(--gold);background:rgba(163,138,31,.08)}.tbl-cmp:hover{border-color:var(--gold);color:var(--gold);background:rgba(163,138,31,.08)}.tbl-add.added{background:rgba(163,138,31,.15);border-color:var(--gold);color:var(--gold);font-size:11px}.tbl-cmp.in-cmp{background:rgba(163,138,31,.15);border-color:var(--gold);color:var(--gold)}.tn{color:var(--white)!important;font-weight:500}.tm{color:var(--muted)!important;font-size:11px!important}.note{background:rgba(212,175,55,.07);border-left:2px solid var(--gold);padding:13px 18px;margin-top:20px}.note p{font-size:12px;color:var(--muted);line-height:1.8}.note strong{color:var(--gold)}.am-split{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;border-top:1px solid var(--border)}@media(max-width:820px){.am-split{grid-template-columns:1fr}}.am-vis{position:relative;overflow:hidden;min-height:520px}.am-vis img{width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:cover;filter:brightness(.4) saturate(.65);position:absolute;inset:0}.am-body{background:var(--bg2);padding:72px 56px;display:flex;flex-direction:column;justify-content:center}@media(max-width:820px){.am-body{padding:48px 24px}.am-vis{min-height:280px}}.s-row{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:12px;margin:26px 0}.ser{background:rgba(212,175,55,.07);border:1px solid var(--border);padding:17px;border-radius:2px}.ser.prem{background:rgba(212,175,55,.13);border-color:var(--border2)}.ser-lbl{font-size:9px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:.12em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--gold);margin-bottom:8px}.ser-desc{font-size:11.5px;color:var(--muted);line-height:1.7}.pills{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);gap:8px;margin-top:8px}.pill{padding:12px 8px;border:1px solid var(--border);text-align:center;background:var(--bg2)}.pn{font-size:12px;color:var(--white);margin-bottom:3px}.ps{font-size:9px;color:var(--muted)}.svc-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);gap:1px;background:var(--border)}@media(max-width:820px){.svc-grid{grid-template-columns:repeat(2,1fr)}}@media(max-width:480px){.svc-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr}}.svc{background:var(--bg2);padding:30px 26px;transition:background .25s}.svc:hover{background:var(--bg3)}.svc-ico{font-size:22px;margin-bottom:14px;line-height:1}.svc-name{font-size:16px;font-weight:400;margin-bottom:9px;line-height:1.3}.svc-desc{font-size:12px;color:var(--muted);line-height:1.75;margin-bottom:15px}.svc-tags{display:flex;gap:6px;flex-wrap:wrap}.svc-tag{font-size:8px;letter-spacing:.1em;text-transform:uppercase;padding:4px 10px;border:1px solid var(--border);color:var(--muted);border-radius:20px}.why-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);gap:1px;background:rgba(212,175,55,.2)}@media(max-width:820px){.why-grid{grid-template-columns:repeat(2,1fr)}}.why{background:#F5F0E8;padding:28px 24px}.why-ico{font-size:20px;margin-bottom:12px;line-height:1}.why-name{font-size:16px;font-weight:600;color:var(--white);margin-bottom:8px}.why-desc{font-size:12px;color:#5a6878;line-height:1.7}.steps{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(4,1fr);gap:1px;background:rgba(212,175,55,.2);margin-top:2px}@media(max-width:820px){.steps{grid-template-columns:repeat(2,1fr)}}.step{background:#F5F0E8;padding:24px 20px}.step-n{font-size:40px;font-weight:300;color:rgba(9,75,135,.15);line-height:1;margin-bottom:14px}.step-t{font-size:12px;font-weight:700;color:var(--white);margin-bottom:6px}.step-d{font-size:11.5px;color:#5a6878;line-height:1.65}.contact{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;min-height:80vh;border-top:1px solid var(--border)}@media(max-width:820px){.contact{grid-template-columns:1fr}}.ct-l{padding:88px 56px;display:flex;flex-direction:column;justify-content:center;border-right:1px solid var(--border)}@media(max-width:820px){.ct-l{padding:64px 24px}}.ci{display:flex;gap:20px;padding:17px
